title: G&T Ore Growth IE & 2xtras support
description: A mod to add support for Ore Growth to work with Immersive Engineering and the sulfur ore from Butchery, and the Dimensional Ores from RFTools Base.
body:
This is a mod that adds support for Immersive Engineering, Butchery and RFToolsBase to work with Ore Growth should you have them installed.

It makes this:

https://modrinth.com/mod/ore-growth/versions

Work for these:

https://modrinth.com/mod/immersiveengineering

https://modrinth.com/mod/butchery *Sulfur Ore

https://modrinth.com/mod/rftools-base *Dimensional Ores

This mod will do nothing alone without Ore Growth and at least one of the three others installed.

Please check my projects for more.
